svg.title: Nest 00 - prompt key (master + negative)
svg.text: Every nest asset = NEST MASTER + scene (sections 1-8) + NEGATIVE
Infrastructure only - not a commander | 40 stalls | stall pheromone TTL fields | no scheduler API
150 kW DC / stall | swap rails 1800x1400x220 mm | 2.4 MVA site | per-agent V2G opt-in
Matte industrial yard | orange safety | no hex hive | no queen tower
No central dispatcher | queen tower | hex depot | HQ slot assignment | fleet V2G command | hive ops center
01 site | 02 layout | 03 pheromone | 04 flow | 05 SOC | 06 price | 07 electrical | 08 operator
